title: Titanic Model Building Blocks Kit, 1860 PCS Cruise Ship Building Set, Micro Mini Bricks Boat Toy Gift for Kids Adults, Not Compatible With Creator Expert 10294
features: Since the Titanic set sail on its fateful maiden journey in 1912, the famous ship has captured imaginations across the world. Now you can pay tribute to it with this Titanic collectible model building project.

Design Inspiration: The inspiration comes from the Titanic Ship , which is one of the famous architectural models in the world. The architectural model of the Titanic Ship restored in proportion gives a very real sense of reality, and the assembled construction kit is very beautiful and exquisite, which can be used as a display item and a collection. This would be a great collectible for architectural lovers.

Premium-quality Cruise ship building kit display models make a big visual impact at home or in the office as decorations. Faithfully recreate the historical details of the Titanic building brick in this ship model.

Exquisite Shape: Each element of the Titanic Ship building is displayed in a miniature ship building block model. The parts are made of ABS materials, durable and eco-friendly. The building block parts have no burrs and feel smooth.

Best Gift Idea: The Titanic building kit is a perfect gift for birthday parties, Christmas, holidays, etc.These building blocks providing more creative and exploratory play fun. After assembling a fine building model, it is also a super great home decoration ornament
